market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Former Pinterest team redesigns email with Extra — and it’s actually good
articles.description: Extra, from a team of former Pinterest designers and engineers, reimagines email around your life instead of the traditional inbox.

articles.title: AI Dungeon maker Latitude unveils Voyage, a platform for creating AI-powered RPGs
articles.description: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.

articles.title: Ransomware negotiator pleads guilty to helping ransomware gang
articles.description: A former employee of a cybersecurity firm pleaded guilty to aiding ransomware criminals to maximize their profits, with the goal of taking a cut of the ransom.

articles.title: Aave’s core markets hit 100% utilization at once, and that's not a good thing
articles.description: CertiK says the lending protocol is in serious trouble while CEO Stani Kulechov tells CoinDesk he does “not have anything useful to say.”

articles.title: AI slop has created a search problem crypto companies can’t ignore
articles.description: Rechler argues that if these companies don’t adopt better content strategies and overly misuse AI-generated tools, their platforms, exchanges or dapps won’t be discovered via search.

articles.title: Bitget exchange brings pre-IPO tokens to masses starting with SpaceX on Solana
articles.description: The crypto exchange opens IPO Prime access with Republic to offer Solana-based tokens tied to private firms ahead of public listings.

articles.title: Bond, a new social media platform, wants to use AI to help you kick your doomscrolling habit
articles.description: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: YouTube expands its AI likeness detection technology to celebrities
articles.description: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection tool to celebrities, giving talent and their reps a way to find and remove deepfakes.

articles.title: Coinbase advisory board says quantum computing threat is on the horizon, crypto needs a plan
articles.description: The 50-page paper concludes that while today’s blockchains remain secure, a future “fault-tolerant quantum computer” capable of breaking widely used encryption is increasingly plausible, and preparation must begin now.

articles.title: Poland stalls on crypto law, forcing local companies to move abroad
articles.description: Poland’s parliament is in a deadlock over crypto and its inability to align local laws with MiCA may drive some local crypto companies abroad.

articles.title: European investors may switch banks for better crypto access, survey finds
articles.description: A survey by Börse Stuttgart Digital shows that 35% of European investors would switch to banks with better crypto offerings, but regulatory uncertainty remains an issue.

articles.title: Fake delivery driver targets French crypto worker in armed home invasion
articles.description: A thwarted home invasion near Montpellier adds to France’s surge in violent “wrench attacks,” as high‑profile and doxxed crypto holders are increasingly in criminals’ sights.

articles.title: 有機會見到台股史上首檔兩萬金股票！高盛給股王信驊目標價 20,000 元
articles.description: 外資高盛券（Goldman Sachs）發布最新個股研究報告表示，對台股股王及全球伺服器管理晶片（BMC）大廠 […]

articles.title: Cut the red tape: 39 financial giants demand an emergency fast-track for Europe's blockchain pilot
articles.description: The firms requested separating the DLT pilot regime from a larger package of 18 financial laws to allow for quicker updates and build real markets.

articles.title: Group of 39 firms urge EU to fast-track DLT rules, warn of lagging the US
articles.description: A 39-member coalition including Nasdaq urged the EU to fast-track DLT pilot changes, warning Europe could lose ground to the US in tokenized finance.

articles.title: UK invites crypto giant Bybit to London to win over some of UAE’s innovation shine
articles.description: Bybit CEO Ben Zhou was invited to meetings in the U.K. this week with government-linked bodies including the FCA and House of Lords.

articles.title: European banks are at risk of losing customers to rivals with better crypto tools
articles.description: A new study found that while European investors find crypto complex, they are increasingly willing to switch banks to find a trusted partner that offers secure and regulated digital asset services.

articles.title: DoorDash is bringing stablecoin payments to masses with Stripe-backed blockchain
articles.description: The delivery service is working with the Stripe-led blockchain firm Tempo to bring stablecoin payouts to its global marketplace, replacing fragmented regional rails.

articles.title: Amazon taps Sweden’s Einride for its electric big rigs
articles.description: The agreement comes just as Einride is finalizing a merger with blank-check company Legato Merger Corp. to go public.
